meta_title: For Students: client workflow to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Student Guide: Client Workflow to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about marketing. Learn how to build a professional client workflow for your AI apps using Antigravity and Claude Code to scale as a student.
content.answer_block: You don't need marketing skills; you need a repeatable client workflow. By automating lead intake, project scoping, and delivery using Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your technical output into a reliable service. This system builds trust, secures testimonials, and turns your first AI projects into a professional portfolio.
content.intro:
The screen is black, the cursor blinks, and you have built a powerful AI tool—yet your inbox remains silent. For most student developers, the 'marketing gap' is a paralyzing chasm between code that works and a business that thrives. You fear that without a massive social media following or a degree in growth hacking, your projects will never see the light of day.

But here is the secret: you don't need to be a marketer; you need to be a process architect. By treating your client interactions as a software pipeline, you can remove the human friction that kills deals. We are going to replace 'selling' with a high-fidelity workflow that proves your value before you ever ask for a dollar.

steps.title: Define Your Service Blueprint
steps.description: Before coding, define the exact scope of your AI service. Use Antigravity to generate a standard project contract.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior SaaS consultant. Generate a 3-page scope-of-work template for an AI automation project, including milestones, deliverables, and a clear 'out of scope' section.

steps.title: Automate Onboarding via Claude
steps.description: Create an automated intake form that captures client needs, ensuring you only work on projects you can deliver.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a client intake form that captures project goals, technical constraints, and budget expectations.

steps.title: Build the Delivery Dashboard
steps.description: Construct a transparency dashboard where clients see progress in real-time, eliminating 'what's the status' emails.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lightweight React component for a client portal that displays project status, pending items, and next milestones.

steps.title: Implement Automated Status Reporting
steps.description: Use Claude Code to parse your git commit history into a weekly client-facing update email.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that extracts commit messages from the last 7 days and summarizes them into a professional, client-friendly progress report.

steps.title: Feedback Loop Integration
steps.description: Add a post-project automated feedback request to turn completed work into social proof and testimonials.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional testimonial request email sequence that emphasizes the technical value delivered to the client.

pro_tips: Never sell a feature; sell a reduction in operational overhead.
Use a 'pre-mortem' meeting to identify risks before the client does.
Always include a 'Pause Clause' in your contracts for scope creep.
Treat your client's Slack or email as a data source for your AI training.
Your best marketing is a case study showing the 'Before' and 'After' of your workflow.
content.next_steps: After setting up your workflow, identify one local business, offer a free trial of your AI tool, and run them through the exact pipeline you just built.
content.conversion_block: You have the technical foundation and the professional workflow. The only thing left is to execute. Stop waiting for permission to be a professional. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
